Class GameController

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
gui.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class GameController extends javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
GameController is responsible for: • Wiring JavaFX timers • Handling keyboard / mouse input • Rendering the grid • Delegating everything else to domain classes It does NOT contain movement AI, blast-zone math, spawn logic, or score math.

  • Property Summary

    Creates an ImageView sized to fit inside a cell.
    private javafx.scene.image.ImageView
    makeHardEnemyQuadrant(javafx.scene.image.Image img, Enemy en, int r, int c)
    สร้าง ImageView ที่แสดงเฉพาะ 1 quadrant ของรูป Hard enemy เมื่อ 4 ช่อง 2×2 มาเรียงกันจะรวมกันเป็นรูปเดียวเต็มตัว - (anchor) → quadrant top-left - (anchor.x + 1) → quadrant top-right - (anchor.y + 1) → quadrant bottom-left - (both + 1) → quadrant bottom-right
    private javafx.scene.control.Label
    makeHintLabel(String text, double fontSize)

  • Method Details

    • loadImages

      private void loadImages()

    • loadDirectional

      private javafx.scene.image.Image[] loadDirectional(String folder, String prefix, String downSuffix)
      Loads 4-directional sprites for one character. index: 0=up(Back), 1=down(Front/Font), 2=left, 3=right

    • loadAudio

      private void loadAudio()

    • startWalkSound

      private void startWalkSound()

    • stopWalkSound

    • makeCellImage

      private javafx.scene.image.ImageView makeCellImage(javafx.scene.image.Image img)
      Creates an ImageView sized to fit inside a cell.

    • makePlayerCellGraphic

      private javafx.scene.layout.StackPane makePlayerCellGraphic(javafx.scene.image.Image playerImg)
      Creates the graphic for the player's tile: WoodEdge.png as an outer frame with the player sprite centred on top.

    • makeHardEnemyQuadrant

      private javafx.scene.image.ImageView makeHardEnemyQuadrant(javafx.scene.image.Image img, Enemy en, int r, int c)
      สร้าง ImageView ที่แสดงเฉพาะ 1 quadrant ของรูป Hard enemy เมื่อ 4 ช่อง 2×2 มาเรียงกันจะรวมกันเป็นรูปเดียวเต็มตัว - (anchor) → quadrant top-left - (anchor.x + 1) → quadrant top-right - (anchor.y + 1) → quadrant bottom-left - (both + 1) → quadrant bottom-right
